summary: Iteration 21: Per-Agent Conway API Key Architecture Testing - All backend tests pass (15/15). Frontend verified: Agent switcher works on Genesis screen and Dashboard header, Conway API Key panel shows 'connected and valid' with key prefix, switching agents changes active agent context correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Per-agent key storage: _get_conway_api_key() in credits.py, sandbox_poller.py, and agent_setup.py reads from active agent's provisioning-status.json
Agent selection: POST /api/agents/{id}/select writes active agent ID to /tmp/anima_active_agent_id and loads that agent's Conway key into env
MongoDB persistence: Conway keys stored on agent documents, restored on server startup via _restore_conway_key_from_db()
Data isolation verified: Switching agents changes provision status agent_id and key context
Frontend agent switcher: Genesis screen has buttons at top, Dashboard has dropdown in header with status indicators
Key prefix (cnwy_k_HUFTe...) displayed correctly on both agents after switch

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Agent switching and Conway key display verified)

test_credentials.note: Valid key with 0 credits (expected for test environment)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 verified the per-agent Conway API key architecture. Key changes: (1) Conway key is stored per-agent in provisioning-status.json and MongoDB agent docs, (2) _get_conway_api_key() functions in credits.py, sandbox_poller.py, agent_setup.py all read from active agent's files, (3) POST /api/agents/{id}/select switches active agent and loads that agent's key, (4) server startup restores all agent keys from MongoDB. Two agents exist: 'anima-fund' (default) and 'TestSkills'. Agent switcher works on both Genesis screen (buttons) and Dashboard header (dropdown with status).
backend_apis_tested: GET /api/agents - 200 OK (returns array with anima-fund and TestSkills)
POST /api/credits/set-key - 200 OK (stores key per-agent, returns credits_cents, key_prefix)
GET /api/provision/status - 200 OK (returns agent_id of active agent)

genesis_screen.agent_switcher_buttons: PASS - 'Anima Fund' and 'TestSkills' buttons at top
genesis_screen.agent_switch_anima_to_testskills: PASS - Header changes to 'TestSkills' after click
genesis_screen.agent_switch_testskills_to_anima: PASS - Header changes back to 'Anima Fund'
genesis_screen.conway_key_panel: PASS - Shows 'connected and valid' with key prefix
genesis_screen.conway_key_prefix_after_switch: PASS - Same key prefix shown after switching agents

dashboard.header_agent_dropdown: PASS - Shows dropdown with both agents and status indicators
dashboard.agent_status_indicator: PASS - Green dot for 'running', text status for 'created'

per_agent_key_storage.provisioning_status_json: Each agent has its own ~/.anima/provisioning-status.json or ~/agents/{id}/.anima/provisioning-status.json
per_agent_key_storage.runtime_env_var: CONWAY_API_KEY env var updated when switching agents

agent_switching.key_loading: On select, reads agent's prov-status.json and sets env var
agent_switching.status_isolation: GET /api/provision/status returns agent_id of active agent

architecture_verified.startup_restoration: _restore_conway_key_from_db() in server.py restores all agent keys from MongoDB
